name: First Cash Pawn
description_short: Colorado Springs, CO's First Cash Pawn at 348 Main Street provides pawn loans and buys gold, jewelry, and electronics.
description_long:
First Cash Pawn at 348 Main Street in downtown Colorado Springs is open Monday through Saturday, 10 AM to 6 PM (closed Sundays). Located in the heart of Colorado Springs, this pawn shop handles everything from jewelry and watches to electronics, musical instruments, and collectibles. The Colorado Springs branch welcomes both first-time customers and regulars seeking fair valuations and fast cash.

The 348 Main Street location specializes in pawn loans, gold and jewelry buying, electronics purchases, watch appraisals, and collectible valuations. Whether you're looking to pawn an item temporarily or sell outright, the team here provides transparent pricing and knowledgeable assessments. Call 719-390-8706 to discuss your items or ask about current inventory before you visit.

First Cash Pawn in Colorado Springs, CO serves residents and visitors needing quick cash access without the hassle of traditional loans. Bring a valid photo ID and any documentation (receipts, certificates of authenticity, or proof of purchase) to help with fair valuation of your items. This Main Street location offers a straightforward alternative to typical financing when you need money fast.
pros: No credit check required—immediate approval based on collateral value, not creditworthiness
Non-recourse loans—you don't lose more than the pledged item; no wage garnishment or collection activity
Instant cash in hand—same-day funding without the multi-day processing of traditional loans
Massive store network of 3,300+ locations ensures accessibility across 29 U.S. states and international markets
Publicly traded company (S&P MidCap 400, Russell 2000) provides regulatory oversight and financial stability
Buy/sell marketplace for merchandise offers alternative to traditional retail and secondhand options
Gold and precious metals buying service provides immediate conversion of assets to cash
Layaway service with affordable 10% down offers installment purchasing without traditional credit
cons: Pawn loan interest rates and fees are significantly higher than personal loans, credit union PALs, or payday alternatives—making them expensive for borrowing
Loss of personal property—if you cannot repay, you permanently lose the item; emotional value not considered
Limited loan amounts tied to item appraisal value—not suitable for large cash needs beyond collateral worth
No credit building—pawn loans do not report to credit bureaus, so borrowing doesn't improve credit scores
Retail merchandise prices may exceed fair market value compared to online retailers or direct sales
best_for: Consumers with immediate cash needs and valuable collateral (jewelry, electronics, instruments) who lack traditional credit
Individuals who need quick liquidity without credit checks or multi-day approval processes
People shopping for discounted secondhand merchandise or seeking to buy/sell valuables in-person
Consumers with poor credit who cannot qualify for personal loans or payday alternatives
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for individuals with immediate cash needs, no access to credit, and valuable personal property to pledge as collateral. The primary caveat is that pawn loans are expensive compared to alternatives like personal loans, credit union PALs, or payday alternatives, and losing collateral creates permanent loss rather than debt recovery options available with traditional lending.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments)
Retail sales of bought and sold merchandise
Gold, silver, and precious metals buying (immediate cash payment)
Layaway plans with 10% down payment option
Online store locator to find nearest location
Lease-to-own and retail finance solutions through subsidiary AFF (15,000+ merchant partners)
Cash-on-spot payment for items sold to FirstCash
FAQ and educational resources about pawn loans
Consumer privacy and terms of use documentation
meta_description: First Cash Pawn at 348 Main Street, Colorado Springs, CO. Fast pawn loans and cash for gold, jewelry, and electronics.
